title: Israel and Lebanon agree new ceasefire as Trump scrambles to end Iran war
summary_full: Despite deal, which is dependent on Hezbollah ceasing fire, Israel carries out multiple drone strikes in southern LebanonMiddle East crisis – live updatesIsrael and Lebanon have agreed to implement a ceasefire to end hostilities, the Trump administration has announced, as the US attempts to overcome one of the largest barriers to reaching a broader deal to end the war with Iran.The Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is contingent on a complete cessation of fire from the Iran-aligned Hezbollah armed group and the evacuation of all its fighters south of the Litani River in south Lebanon, said a statement from the US, Lebanon and Israel, released by the US state department after negotiations in Washington. Continue reading...
